plugins.prepareCmd: cargo build --release && (cd ui && npm ci --no-audit --no-fund && npm run build) && (git diff $(git describe --tags --abbrev=0 2>/dev/null || echo HEAD~1)..HEAD --name-only -- tray/src-tauri/src tray/src-tauri/Cargo.* tray/create-icons.sh 2>/dev/null | grep -q . && (cd tray && bash create-icons.sh) || echo '  · tray source unchanged since last release — skipping icon generation') && (cd tray && npm ci --no-audit --no-fund && npm run build) && bash scripts/set-version.sh ${nextRelease.version} && bash scripts/package-release.sh ${nextRelease.version} && bash scripts/verify-release-bundle.sh ${nextRelease.version}
